creator: tacid@tacid.kiev.ua
text:
After an update to net-snmp 5.7 php5-snmp failed to compile because the hardcoded LIB_DEPENDS netsnmp.20 in lang/php5/Makefile.ext

Fix: patch the lang/php5/Makefile.ext

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: update to net-mgmt/net-snmp 5.7 and try to recompile net-mgmt/php5-snmp
